sections.title: Resourcing & Timeline
sections.description: Effort estimate, team composition, and delivery timeline.
required_content: Effort range (low/mid/high) in days and weeks — from resourcing report

sections.title: Budget
sections.description: Cost breakdown covering build, infrastructure, and ongoing operations.
required_content: Build cost: effort days × day rate
Total cost of ownership for year 1

sections.title: Return on Investment
sections.description: Expected financial and operational return from the investment.
required_content: Quantified benefits (time saved, error reduction, cost avoidance)
3-year NPV or ROI estimate where data supports it
